store.shippingZonesRestrictedDesc: Zamura gahunda yawe kugira ngo ucunge uturere twihariye two kohereza, ushyireho ibiciro bihamye ku turere dutandukanye, kandi utange uburyo bworoshye bwo kohereza ku bakiriya bawe.

store.upgradeForInsights: Jya ku Pro cyangwa Elite kugirango ubone CTR, imbonerahamwe z'imikorere y'ibicuruzwa, amakuru y'aho uri n'imijya ya buri kwezi.
store.revenueTrendDesc: Inyungu ya buri kwezi n'umubare w'ibitumizo (uyu mwaka)

ai.title: Aicon AI
ai.placeholder: Mbaza ikibazo icyo aricyo cyose ku bicuruzwa, kohereza, gusubiza...
ai.poweredBy: Inkomoko: Aicon AI · Inama ni iz'umuntu ku giti cye
ai.welcomeMessage:
Muraho! Ndi **Aicon AI** 🛍️

Nshoboye kukufasha:
- **Kubona ibicuruzwa** bishoboka bitewe n'isura yawe n'ingengo y'imari
- **Kubona amaciro meza** mu byiciro byose
- **Gusubiza ibibazo** ku kohereza, gusubiza & amategeko
- **Gutanga inama z'umuntu ku giti cye** zishingiye ku bikurangaho

Uri gushaka iki uyu munsi?
ai.failedToAddToCart: Byanze kugira ngo bongerwe mu gitebo
ai.errorResponse: Mbabarira, ngira ikibazo cyo gusubiza ubu. Nyamuneka gerageza nyuma.
ai.chip_lastOrder: Iri he itumiza ryanjye rya nyuma?

subscription.paymentProcessDesc: Nyuma yo gukanda komeza, uzabona ubutumwa bwa USSD kuri telefone yawe kugira ngo wemeze kwishyura. Gahunda yawe izemezwa nyuma yo kwemeza kwishyura.

subscription.paymentInstructionsDesc: Injiza kode ya USSD kuri telefone yawe hanyuma ukurikize amabwiriza kugira ngo wemeze kwishyura. Ntukafunge iyi paji kugeza kwishyura birangiye.
subscription.paymentFailedDesc: Kwishyura ntibyarangiye. Ibi bishobora guterwa no guhagarika, amafaranga adahagije, cyangwa ikibazo cy'urusobe.
subscription.paymentFailedReasonDesc: Nyamuneka ongera ugerageze cyangwa uvugane n'inkunga niba ikibazo gikomeje. Gahunda yawe ntizemezwa kugeza kwishyura birangiye neza.
subscription.cancelPlanDesc: Guhagarika bizahita bigabanya iduka ryawe ku gahunda ya Starter y'ubuntu. Ibi ntibishobora gusubizwa inyuma.
subscription.cancelPendingDesc: Ibi bizahagarika izamuka ritegerejwe kandi bikomeze gahunda yawe ikorwa ubu.
subscription.cancelFailed: Guhagarika gahunda byanze. Nyamuneka ongera ugerageze.

faq.title: Ibibazo Bikunze Kubazwa
faq.a1: Ushobora gukurikirana itumwa ryawe usura paji ya 'Ibitumwa' mu profili yawe hanyuma ukanda ku itumwa ryihariye. Uzabona ivugurura mu gihe nyacyo na nimero yo gukurikirana niba ihari.
faq.a2: Dutanga ingingo y'gusubiza iminsi 14 ku bisubizo byinshi. Niba utishimye, ushobora gutangira gusubiza uva ku paji ya 'Amakuru y'Itumwa'. Ibintu bigomba kuba mu miterere yabyo ya mbere.
faq.a3: Genda ku 'Iduka ryanjye' mu menyu yo kuyobora hanyuma ukurikire amabwiriza yo guteranya. Uzakenera gutanga amakuru fatizo no kugaragaza ubunyange bwawe.
faq.a4: Yego, buri kwishyura bikorwa binyuze mu nzira zifunguye nka ITEC Pay. Ntibigera bigumiza amakuru yose y'ikarita yawe ku seriveri zacu.

report.title: Raporo Ikibazo

report.detailsPlaceholder: Tanga amakuru arambuye kugira tukufashe byihuse...
